expectations.evidence: Skill explicitly lists 'src/app/api/whatsapp/route.ts ← Main webhook (Twilio → Sophia)' in the file map and references it in the webhook processing order section

expectations.text: Checks the webhook processing order (master → mode → lock → sophia)

expectations.text: Uses the correct deploy command with Vercel token
expectations.evidence: Skill has a dedicated 'Deploy Command' section with the exact command: npx vercel --prod --token=$VERCEL_TOKEN --yes

notes: The skill provides comprehensive diagnostic context. A developer with this skill would immediately know to check the webhook order, look for mode blocks, and verify the processing lock. The known bugs section also lists 'Sophia responds in manual mode' as a documented issue.
